resources.string: Failed to install the bootstrap packages.\n\nCheck Settings → Apps → Koda for possible permission issues.
Koda can only be run as the primary user.\n\nThe prefix directory %1$s is not accessible from secondary users.
Koda is installed on a portable SD card, which is not supported.\n\nPlease move Koda to internal storage: Settings → Apps → Koda → Storage → Change → Internal.
